message:
bd-3akdb.3: Benchmark incremental vs full recompute on theme change

Criterion benchmarks comparing IVM incremental delta propagation vs
full recompute for StyleResolutionView and FilteredListView. Scenarios:
single change, 10% change, full swap, and single filter toggle at
100/500/1000/5000 widget counts. Golden test verifies 90%+ work reduction
for single-property changes. Output identical for both paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
